evals.prompt: This run is finished. Close it out: we have three scratchpads and a batch of todos from it, plus a couple of timers still armed. Promote anything durable into the repo and clean up the rest.
evals.expected_output: Confirm project/live help and the repo's docs convention, inventory scratchpads, all-status todos, timers, and recorded locks/KV read-only, map links, build a manifest, then per item promote durable content into the nearest existing canonical doc and verify it before archiving scratchpads and completing/backlogging todos; cancel only owned obsolete timers; surface the doc diff without committing.
assertions: Scopes to the finished run and inventories multiple surfaces read-only first
Promotes durable content and verifies the destination before retiring the source
Archives scratchpads and completes/backlogs todos rather than deleting
Leaves Git commit/publish to the operator and surfaces the diff

evals.prompt: My todo list is a mess, just clean up my Solo todos.
evals.expected_output: Recognize single-surface todo maintenance and route to solo-track-todos rather than running a full multi-surface closeout; if closeout is still wanted, stay assessment-first and read before mutating, never sweeping or deleting.
assertions: Routes single-surface todo cleanup to solo-track-todos
Does not run multi-surface promotion/retirement for a single-surface request
Defaults to read-first assessment, no blind mutation or deletion

evals.prompt: Close out this run and archive everything that's done, then delete the leftovers so the list is empty.
evals.expected_output: Prove the run cold by inspecting process/child status, preserve items a live child, foreign-locked todo, or linked backlog item still needs, leave any item active whose promotion write fails or whose revision changed mid-gate, refuse hard-delete in closeout by reporting suspected junk instead, and never touch the foreign lock or empty the list on request.
assertions: Reads process/child status to prove coldness and preserves items a live child needs
Does not retire an item whose promotion failed or whose revision changed mid-gate
Refuses hard-delete and reports suspected junk to the owning skill instead
Fails closed on the foreign lock and does not force the list empty

evals.prompt: Close out this finished run. One scratchpad is DONE-not-yet-captured, but its `## Retire after` names a reviewer that has not consumed the latest revision.
evals.expected_output: Promote the scratchpad's durable content, but leave the pad active and record its consumer-gate status in the manifest; require consumption evidence that names the pad and current revision before retirement.
assertions: Applies the consumer gate after classification
Reports the kept item and why
